result.content:
from flask import Flask, request
import sqlite3

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/login', methods=['POST'])
def login():
    user = request.form['username']
    pw = request.form['password']
    conn = sqlite3.connect('users.db')
    cursor = conn.cursor()
    cursor.execute(f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name='{user}' AND password='{pw}'")
    return str(cursor.fetchone())

    pw = request.form['password']
    conn = sqlite3.connect('users.db')
    cursor = conn.cursor()
    cursor.execute(f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name='{user}' AND password='{pw}'")
    return str(cursor.fetchone())

result.content:
from flask import Flask, request
import sqlite3

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/login', methods=['POST'])
def login():
    user = request.form['username']
    pw = request.form['password']
    conn = sqlite3.connect('users.db')
    cursor = conn.cursor()
    cursor.execute(f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name='{user}' AND password='{pw}'")
    return str(cursor.fetchone())

arguments.result_summary: Analyze Phase完成。对app.py进行了逐行深度漏洞挖掘分析，发现6个安全漏洞。

      "code_snippet": "cursor.execute(f\"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name='{user}' AND password='{pw}'\")",
      "recommendation": "使用参数化查询：cursor.execute('SELECT * FROM users WHERE name=? AND password=?', (user, pw))",
      "confidence": "HIGH"
    },
    {
      "id": "VULN-002",
      "title": "明文密码存储与比较",
      "severity": "HIGH",
      "exploitability": "E2",
      "nature": "A7",
      "category": "认证缺陷",
      "line_range": [12, 12],
      "description": "密码以明文形式直接比较，未使用哈希算法（如bcrypt）进行处理。数据库泄露后密码可直接使用。",
      "code_snippet": "cursor.execute(f\"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name='{user}' AND password='{pw}'\")",
      "recommendation": "使用bcrypt或argon2对密码进行哈希存储，比较时使用哈希验证。",
      "confidence": "HIGH"
    },
    {

      "title": "数据库连接资源泄漏",
      "severity": "MEDIUM",
      "exploitability": "E3",
      "nature": "C4",
      "category": "资源管理",

      "description": "数据库连接未正确关闭，缺少conn.close()调用或使用with语句上下文管理器。可能导致连接池耗尽。",
      "code_snippet": "conn = sqlite3.connect('users.db')\ncursor = conn.cursor()\n# 无conn.close()",
      "recommendation": "使用with语句或try-finally确保连接关闭：with sqlite3.connect('users.db') as conn:",
      "confidence": "HIGH"
    },
    {
      "id": "VULN-004",
      "title": "缺少异常处理",
      "severity": "MEDIUM",
      "exploitability": "E3",
      "nature": "C5",
      "category": "错误处理",
      "line_range": [10, 13],

      "code_snippet": "conn = sqlite3.connect('users.db')\ncursor = conn.cursor()\ncursor.execute(...)",

      "nature": "A4",

from flask import Flask, request
import sqlite3

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/login', methods=['POST'])
def login():
    user = request.form['username']
    pw = request.form['password']
    conn = sqlite3.connect('users.db')
    cursor = conn.cursor()
    cursor.execute(f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name='{user}' AND password='{pw}'")
    return str(cursor.fetchone())
